---
title: "Jοναθαν Τεμπλιν (Jonathan Templin)"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
  image: "images/IMG_1435-725x1024.jpeg"
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jonathan-templin@uiowa.edu
    - icon: BlueSky
      text: BlueSky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/jonathantemplin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jonathantemplin
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7616-0973
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6WctsOhVfGW1D9NZUH1xFg
---

::: {#hero-heading align="left"}
I am Professor and E. F. Lindquist Chair in the Educational Measurement and Statistics program, a part of the Department of Psychological and Quantitative Foundations in the College of Education at the University of Iowa.

My research interests are focused on the development of psychometric and general quantitative methods, as applied in the psychological, educational, and social sciences. I teach courses on advanced quantitative methodology with an emphasis on statistical modeling, model comparisons, and the integration and generalities of popular statistical and psychometric techniques.
:::

::: {.panel-tabset align="left"}
## Contact Information

-   University of Iowa Campus Office:

<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/6GJw7snqsaMTBnk99" target="_blank">S300A Lindquist Center</a><br> University of Iowa<br> Iowa City, Iowa 52242<br><br>

-   Innovative Assessment Solutions Office:

<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4yuiUUoQqwVzYZ897" target="_blank">University of Iowa BioVentures Center</a><br> 2500 Crosspark Road, Suite W140 <br> Coralville, Iowa 52241<br><br>

## Upcoming and Recent Courses

-   [Multivariate Modeling (Spring 2026; EDF 9780; Clemson)](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Multivariate-Modeling-Spring-2026/)

-   [Structural Equation Modeling (Fall 2025; PSQF 6249; University of Iowa)](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Structural-Equation-Modeling-Fall-2025/)

-   [Multilevel Measurement Models Workshop (July 2025)](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/MultilevelMeasurementModels2025/)

-   [Missing Data Methods (Spring 2025; PSQF 7375; University of Iowa)](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/MissingDataMethods2025/)

-   [Bayesian Psychometric Modeling (Fall 2024; PSQF 7375; University of Iowa)](https://jonathantemplin.github.io/Bayesian-Psychometric-Modeling-Course-Fall-2024/)

## Quick Links

-   [Course Archive](archived-courses.qmd) — every course taught from Fall 2017 onward, with links to materials.

-   [DCM Book Companion Site](dcmbook.qmd) — supplemental materials for *Diagnostic Measurement: Theory, Methods, and Applications* (Rupp, Templin, & Henson, 2010).

-   [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/jonathantemplin) — code, course repos, and software.
:::
